description: The main advantage of Perfecto is that all the latest versions are available on perfecto cloud.
author: Aditya T.
pros: Perfecto tool is available on Private Cloud and access through web-based platform. Perfecto tool is developed upon Selenium+Quantum(Quemetric automation framework) with additional features. Base framework is Selenium+Cucumber.
cons: Perfecto dashboard does not provide direct report on test Coverage. Just provides number of test cases passed/failed through Jenkins pipeline.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Pefecto, the best tool for Mobile testing
description: It is a great product and customisable to any extent.Great supportive team to work with.The team is really passionate to listen to customers and give possible solutions very quick.
author: ullas M.
pros: Great customer support.Good Coverage of all mobiles including beta version browsers.

author: Baskar M.
pros: 1. Doing the testing on the CI/CD in automated way.
cons: 1. The support or having trouble when we found the issues on test execution

author: Jacques G.
pros: The quality of the service, renewable Trials (with waiting for the account closing) for unfrequent testing and a responsive support.
cons: Password input feature which does not work well, the not friendly UI (I prefered for example the one of Test Object bought by sauce labs). I also regrets the "buy for X hours" formula from TestObject, more affordable than the current plans for startup projects.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A good mature tool to meet the needs for organization Mobile and web testing
description: The Banks overall experience has be great, it has allowed QA to meet the demand of the development teams to provide the needed testing For a better understanding of where the bank was and the process it went through I recommend the following webinar https://www.perfecto.io/webinars/how-one-bank-leveraged-right-tools-accelerate-testing
author: David K.
pros: It integrated smoothly into our process. It provides a tool that we could use interactively as well as doing automation It provides a scalable solution for the cloud It provides a secure environment to do testing (very important) to a Financial Institution It provides the ability to also do web testing and the ability to unify both web and mobile testing The ability to do Real User Simulations for testing It provides the ability for manual tester and development to be a part of the testing by the use of codeless automation
cons: At this date I do not have any issues with the product. The Perfecto team worked with me to resolve them and when we did have an issue with bringing it in to our processes it was more of the bank's issue as to an issue with Perfecto The codeless automation tool does have it issues but with that said codeless automation in the industry is growing and Perfecto is determined to grow with it

description: Overall experience is fantastic. We’re able to efficiently test many scenarios in a much quicker timeframe than we would if we were physically using these devices to test.
author: Kayla S.
pros: Ability to tailor cloud devices based on what our consumers are using; as well as the ability to integrate with other software used by the company.
cons: There were a couple instances of false positives. Defects we received on the devices in our cloud but were unable to replicate on actual devices.

review_title: Enabled us to run automation tests on a regular basis to build confidence in app in an agile env.
author: Ray S.
pros: Ability to have seamless cloud of devices - hosted and on-prem. No need to maintain hosted devices. Availability of new devices quickly on the public cloud.
cons: Full functionality on-site limited to Android devices - iOS requires some dev intervention/instrumentation.

description: This tool helped us in finding couple critical bugs on info block internal application urls etc.
author: Mahesh C.
pros: Cross Browser Testing with selected OS and Resolution
cons: short notice on outage windows for cloud

author: Seenivasa ragavan S.
pros: Reducing the manual testing and have great automatic testing tool
cons: Facing issues while running job and need to follow up to resolve the issue

author: Timothy P.
pros: Allows us to easily share devices for testing. Works well with running multiple scripts automatically. Works well for large teams. Provides a lot of support.
cons: Using local devices is better if working with a small team.

description: Il s'agit d'un logiciel de gestion financière simple à comprendre. Son prix prix d'achat raisonnable et il fournit des information fiable.
author: Lucrece A.
pros: Le logiciel perfecto est un très bon logiciel de comptabilité qui permet de générer des état financiers (bilant et le compte de résultat). Il facilite la gestion des actifs de même que le suivi budgétaire. C’est un logiciel très facile à utiliser et s’adapte à toutes type d’entreprise quel que soit sa taille
cons: rien. tout est bon dans l'utilisation de ce logiciel

description: I am using it for regression tests for tools and apps. The experience has been amazing so far.
author: Pooja W.
pros: The ability to test on different devices and save on testing time and budget. It is easy to learn and not difficult to master as well.
cons: The license model is quite expensive. Organizations has to pick and chose whom they should provide it, so difficult to get it who want to learn it from beginner level.

review_title: App QA Automation using native instrumentation
description: Excellent account and technical management reps. R&D open to feature requests providing mostly in a timely manner.
author: Nitsan B.
pros: Caters to Espresso & XCUI, Strong API, easy to use
cons: Elusive device errors with unclear descriptions, difficult to troubleshoot with support

author: ryan S.
pros: Easy to use. Great page layout, especially with the ongoing switch from older Flash functions to HTML 5 functions.
cons: Sometimes runs a little slow on ios, but nothing bad. Just a tiny bit slower than Android.

author: Cedric Toussaint G.
pros: Ce logiciel fait beaucoup de chose en développement d'applications
cons: C'est un logiciel qui peut êtres améliorer a part ça il fonctionne bien
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
